ham: Hello, this is a quick update from your broadband service provider. Our engineer will be visiting your location tomorrow at 10:00 AM to perform routine maintenance on your router. Please ensure someone is available to grant access. No payment required. If you have any questions, reply YES.
spam: Hi!! We have great news for you. Your crditt card lmit has been approved for an increase of ₹5,000. To claim your new lmit, please click <URL> and enter your account details. URGENT: Act fast – offer expires soon! Thank you!!
